missing_in_hivau.video_description: On the construction site, several police officers arrested a man wearing a hat.
A man who robbed a supermarket was arrested by multiple policemen.
A man poured gasoline on a car and lit it.
A black car on the side of the road suddenly caught fire late at night, the driver quickly fled, and then firefighters extinguished the flames.
A white car parked on the side of the road was ignited by two people in a passing car, and then the two men drove away.
A restaurant was dumped with gasoline and ignited.
Many men beat each other in a square during the day.

During the day, a man drove to a laundry room, beat a staff member and drove away.
